payload.answer: I can suggest non-committal ways to record this context, without saving it.
citations: "For context, Nur and Sara are my twin daughters."
repair_options: Add as a separate context note: Nur and Sara are twin daughters.
Keep this as contextual information only, without merging it into any existing family profile.
If there is already a record for one child, consider asking whether to keep both individual entries and also note that they are twins.
